name: @pua-ai/pua-code
author: Pua <support@pua.com>
description: Use Pua, Pua's AI assistant, right from your terminal. Pua can understand your codebase, edit files, run terminal commands, and handle entire workflows for you.

scripts.prepare: node -e "if (!process.env.AUTHORIZED) { console.error('ERROR: Direct publishing is not allowed.\nPlease see the release workflow documentation to publish this package.'); process.exit(1); }"
